steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: Subtract $4$, then divide by $6$ in $6x+4=58$: $x=9$. The coefficient on $x$ is nonzero.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: There is exactly one solution. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above is Exactly one, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore B is correct.
